overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character in a red jacket walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The scene transitions from an underpass through commercial streets lined with holographic billboards to an open plaza, with wet streets reflecting the vibrant artificial lighting.

events.description: exits covered underpass with yellow curbs onto open city sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through urban underpass and emerging onto street, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking opposite direction
pedestrian in red shirt walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
painted yellow concrete barriers defining the underpass walkway
massive concrete pillars and ceiling of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a covered underpass defined by yellow concrete barriers and graffiti-covered walls. After turning a corner, the character emerges onto an open sidewalk, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past illuminated advertisements

entered.detail: large digital screen displaying 'Pew Overload' advertisement with weapon graphics
massive screen showing fiery explosion imagery with text
futuristic vehicles parked along the street curb

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet city sidewalk lined with large digital billboards displaying futuristic advertisements. The street features parked vehicles and the graffiti wall recedes into the distance as the character progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor beneath overpass with drainage grates

events.description: enters covered area beneath concrete overpass with metal drainage grates

agents.ego_description: walking under massive overpass structure with industrial piping visible overhead

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving past on the adjacent street

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass spanning across the street above
rectangular metal drainage grates set into the sidewalk surface
exposed industrial pipes running along the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive concrete overpass with industrial piping and metal drainage grates set into the sidewalk. A futuristic car drives past on the street as the environment becomes more industrial and enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with holographic advertisements and food vendor

events.description: exits overpass into open intersection with large holographic advertisements
crosses the multi-lane street at the intersection between vehicles

agents.ego_description: approaching intersection, passing a food vendor cart, and crossing the street between moving traffic

notable_agents.action: black car waiting at the intersection
oncoming car with headlights illuminated approaching the crossing

entered.detail: colorful food vendor cart with orange and green panels
massive green holographic projection of a figure in a suit
blue holographic figure floating above the street in the distance
marked pedestrian crosswalk lines on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into a wide intersection featuring a food vendor cart and massive green holographic advertisements. The character crosses the multi-lane street between vehicles, with a floating holographic figure visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza walkway with stone railings and landscaped trees

events.description: enters paved plaza area with stone railings and landscaped trees

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated plaza pathway with decorative stone railings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian sitting on the plaza steps near the railing

entered.detail: light-colored stone balustrade lining the elevated walkway
mature trees with full canopies lining the plaza path
tall building facade with reflective glass windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a paved plaza pathway lined with stone railings and mature trees, passing by a seated pedestrian. The area features modern glass building facades and the floating holographic figure remains visible in the distance to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic city, transitioning from a gritty urban underpass into a polished, open plaza. It begins within a covered walkway defined by yellow concrete barriers and graffiti, moving past pedestrians as the character emerges onto a wet sidewalk lined with towering digital billboards. The scene then shifts toward a more industrial atmosphere, passing beneath a massive concrete overpass with exposed piping and metal grates as a futuristic car drives by. As the camera clears the overpass, the environment opens into a wide intersection featuring a food vendor and massive green holographic advertisements that glow against the night sky. Finally, the path leads away from the traffic and into a paved plaza with stone railings and mature trees, moving alongside modern glass facades while a floating holographic figure lingers in the distance.
